'''Mount Ste'vshuulsz''' was a jagged mountain located on the dark, murky [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barab I/Legends|Barab I]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Sheer slopes of shale rock, the mountain was home to the wild [[skotcarp]]s.

{{Loc-stub}}
